data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for `external_calendar_id`.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the external source payload with `external_calendar_id`, but there is no evidence provided that confirms the existence or retrieval of such data. The linked use case mentions the need for this data, yet the prior step evidence does not include any checks or reads that validate the presence of `external_calendar_id`. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence of external source payload with `external_calendar_id`.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the presence of `external_calendar_id`.
